nasb.text: He who diligently seeks good seeks favor, But he who seeks evil, evil will come to him.

esv.text: Whoever diligently seeks good seeks favor, but evil comes to him who searches for it.

cnv.text: 殷切求善的，必得到愛顧； 追求邪惡的，邪惡必臨到他。

ccb.text: 寻求良善得恩惠， 追求罪恶遭祸患。

csbs.text: 切切寻求美善的，必找到恩典； 而寻求恶事的，恶事必临到他。
